task_description: Implement a secret multi-project/account system where each project is an isolated collection of workspaces with its own password. The entire multi-project system is hidden - no visible UI reveals its existence. Project management (create, switch, delete) is accessed only through secret keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+Shift+P) or a hidden gesture (triple-tap logo). Each project's data is fully isolated.

verification.summary: Build passes cleanly. No test framework in project. Implementation verified through 3-pass semantic review (v3 APPROVED). All 9 issues identified across reviews have been resolved: SHA-256 password hashing, Date.now() fix, shared panel JSX, debounced auto-save, passwordless UX, export isolation confirmed, dead reference check removed, delete-project auth bypass fixed, state updater purity fixed.
